headline: Is General Mills (GIS) Starting To Look Attractive After A 26.5% One-Year Share Price Fall
summary: If you are wondering whether General Mills is starting to look like value at the current share price, this article will walk through what the numbers are really saying about the stock. The share price closed at US$43.57, with returns of a 3.0% decline over 7 days, a 6.3% decline over 30 days, a 4.7% decline year to date, and a 26.5% decline over the last year, as well as a 37.7% decline over 3 years and a 10.4% decline over 5 years. headline: A Look At General Mills (GIS) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: General Mills (GIS) is back on investors’ radar after recent trading left the shares with mixed short and longer term returns, prompting a closer look at how the food maker’s fundamentals line up with its valuation. See our latest analysis for General Mills. The recent share price slide, with a 30 day share price return of a 6.3% decline and a 1 year total shareholder return of a 26.5% decline, points to fading momentum as investors weigh General Mills' fundamentals against its current...

headline: General Mills Hits Color Free School Goal As Stock Weakness Persists
summary: General Mills has fully removed certified colors from its K-12 school foods portfolio ahead of schedule. The change covers all school-focused products, including reformulated versions of popular items such as Lucky Charms. This shift aligns with growing attention on food additives in children's diets and school meal quality standards. For investors watching NYSE:GIS, this move comes as the stock trades at $43.57, with a 1 year return of a 26.5% decline and a 3 year return of a 37.7%...
